title.purpose: Screen titles and section headers; weight + size only, no tracked eyebrows.

body.purpose: Prose and field text; 16px hard floor for iOS.

label.purpose: Control labels, tab text, chips, captions.

numeric.purpose: Every monetary amount and GST figure; tabular monospace, color-tinted by direction.

shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: The single neon halo; primary CTA only, removed when disabled.

motion.name: ios-spring
motion.purpose: Default easing for screen/sheet/push transitions and press feedback (UIKit spring approximation).

motion.name: pop
motion.purpose: Context-menu pop-in from an anchor (slight overshoot).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single glowing call-to-action (capture, extract, export, save).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-accent-ink); border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9375rem; box-shadow: 0 0 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent) 28%, transparent); transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), opacity 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; box-shadow: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: All secondary actions; never a bare text-link.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--color-surface-2); color: var(--color-ink); border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 14px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Alternate primary (e.g. a second capture path); accent text on a 1.5px accent border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--color-accent); border: 1.5px solid var(--color-accent); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9375rem; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Field
components.description: Text input; 16px floor prevents iOS focus-zoom. Border shifts toward accent on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-ink); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-field::placeholder { color: var(--color-ink-muted); } .ds-field:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent); }

components.name: Add Chip
components.description: Dashed 'add category' placeholder pill that becomes an inline input on tap.
components.css: .ds-chip-add { background: transparent; color: var(--color-ink-muted); border: 1px dashed var(--color-ink-muted); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-chip-add:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Card
components.description: List row / grouped container; flat, hairline border, no shadow. Nested cards forbidden.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-ink); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-amount-neg { font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-danger); }

components.name: Glass Nav Dock
components.description: Top-anchored frosted pill; active tab = accent fill, inactive = muted. Blur lives on a no-filter outer wrapper so popups escape the stacking context.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav"><button class="ds-nav-item ds-nav-active">📷 拍照</button><button class="ds-nav-item">📋 列表</button><button class="ds-nav-item">📊 统计</button><button class="ds-nav-item">⋯</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 6px; border-radius: 16px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-bg) 72%, transparent); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; border: none; background: transparent; color: var(--color-ink-muted); border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-active { background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-accent-ink); }

components.name: Amount
components.description: The signature figure: monospace, sign-prefixed, tinted green (positive) or rose (negative).
components.css: .ds-amount-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-amount-pos { font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--color-accent); } .ds-gst { font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-ink-muted); }

narrative.overview: A bookkeeper's ledger rendered for the dark: aurora-green figures ruled onto near-black, divided by hairlines rather than boxed in chrome. The system's job is to make a financial record feel correct — exact, legible, unhurried — and to disappear into the task of capturing and reconciling receipts. Restraint is the trust mechanism: a tool that touches tax earns confidence by being quiet and precise, not by being decorated. The default surface is near-pure black with a single living color (aurora green) reserved for what is active, primary, or positive; figures are monospace so money aligns like a statement; structure is hairlines, not shadows. A co-equal iOS-grouped light theme shares the same token contract.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas, one aurora-green accent used sparingly and meaningfully
Monospace for every figure; system sans for everything else
Flat by default — hairline borders carry all structure, shadows do not
Exactly one glow (the primary CTA) and one glass surface (the nav)
Calm density: one task per screen, breathing room over chrome
Two co-equal themes (dark Midnight Ledger / light iOS-grouped) on one token contract

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: Aurora green appears on a small fraction of any screen and only with meaning: primary action, active selection, or a positive figure. The moment it decorates something neutral, it stops reading as 'this matters.'

rules.name: The Green-In / Red-Out Rule
rules.body: Income and positive net are aurora green; expense and negative deltas are danger rose. Color reinforces the +/- sign prefix — it never replaces it.

rules.name: The 16px Floor Rule
rules.body: No input font-size below 16px, ever. iOS Safari force-zooms the page when focusing a sub-16px field and never zooms back.

rules.name: The Figures-in-Mono Rule
rules.body: Money is always set in the numeric monospace font. A dollar amount in the body sans is a bug — columns won't align.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Structure is drawn with 1px borders at white-10% (dark) / #e4e4e9 (light), not with shadows.

rules.name: The Single Glow Rule
rules.body: Exactly one element glows (the primary CTA) and exactly one frosts (the nav). Any third glow or blur is a regression.

dos: Do keep aurora green rare and meaningful — primary action, active state, positive figures only.
Do set every monetary figure in the numeric monospace font, sign-prefixed and color-tinted by direction.
Do build structure from 1px hairlines and tonal steps; stay flat.
Do anchor navigation at the top and let only scrollable content touch the bottom edge.
Do reinforce income/expense with the +/- sign, not color alone.
Do give every interactive element the scale(0.96) press response on the shared iOS easing, with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
donts: Don't look like enterprise accounting bloat (Xero / MYOB / QuickBooks): no toolbar-everywhere chrome, no intimidating multi-column forms.
Don't look like playful consumer fintech: no gradients, mascots, confetti, gamified streaks, or candy blobs.
Don't look like a generic admin template: no Material/Bootstrap card grids, no hero-metric tiles.
Don't look like skeuomorphic receipt kitsch: no faux thermal-paper texture, torn edges, or dot-matrix fonts.
Don't add a second glow or a second glass surface.
Don't use drop shadows for elevation — that's off-system.
Don't use background-clip:text gradient text, or border-left/right > 1px colored side-stripes.
Don't use the native date input (locale ignores page language); use the custom DateField.
Don't let aurora green decorate neutral content.
